overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a brown coat trudging through deep snow on a mountainous slope. The scene features snow-covered evergreen trees, rocky outcroppings, and distant mountain peaks under an overcast winter sky, with the camera steadily following the character from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy mountain slope with dense pine forest and rock outcroppings

agents.ego_description: trudging through deep snow up the mountain slope, leaving a trail behind

entered.detail: tall snow-covered evergreen tree with thick trunk close to the path
dark rocks partially buried in snow on the left slope
steep incline covered in deep white snow extending upward
snow-capped mountain peaks visible through the haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a steep snowy mountainside, passing close to a large snow-laden pine tree on the left. Rock outcroppings emerge from the snow on the left slope while distant mountain peaks loom ahead through the overcast haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail winding through forested terrain

events.description: passing the large pine tree, the path widens slightly with more trees visible on the right
character adjusts path slightly to the right as the trail curves through the snow

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snow path as the terrain gradually opens into a valley

entered.detail: wide depression between slopes opening up ahead, covered in snow

segments.scene_description: Moving past the large tree, the character proceeds along a widening trail through the snow. Rock outcroppings recede into the distance on the left while the valley ahead becomes more visible, framed by scattered pine trees on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow valley with panoramic mountain views

events.description: emerging from the denser tree line into a wide open snow field

agents.ego_description: walking across the expansive open snow field toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: expansive flat area covered in deep snow with minimal obstacles

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open snow valley where the terrain flattens and the forest thins out. Distant mountains become more prominent ahead while the surrounding slopes recede, creating a sense of vast open wilderness under the gray overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a steep mountainside that gradually opens into a vast, desolate snow valley. It begins with the character trudging past a large, snow-laden pine tree and rocky outcroppings that cling to the steep left slope under an overcast haze. As the character moves forward, the trail widens and the rocky terrain recedes, shifting the perspective toward a broadening valley framed by scattered evergreens. The scene then expands as the character enters a wide open expanse where the terrain flattens and the forest thins out. Finally, the surrounding slopes fall away to reveal prominent distant mountain peaks looming over the wilderness under a heavy gray sky.
